name: Tourti=8are Maison French Canadian Meat P=
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat oil in a large, heavy frying pan and sauté ground pork, veal, and beef until crumbly. Add garlic and onions, and sauté until vegetables are soft.
2. Add beef broth, sage, bay leaf, cinnamon, nutmeg, cloves, parsley flakes, dry celery leaves, and celery seeds. Cover and simmer for 20 to 30 minutes.
3. Add brandy and breadcrumbs. Blend in salt and pepper. Simmer briefly until the mixture is moist.
4. Preheat oven to 425°F (220°C).
5. Line three 9-inch pie pans with pastry dough, reserving an equal amount of dough for top crusts. Fill each pan with meat mixture.
6. Cover pies with pastry, cutting two slits in the center of each pie to allow steam to escape.
7. Brush each pie with beaten egg.
8. Bake tourtières for 10 minutes. Reduce heat to 350°F (180°C) and cook until crust is golden-brown, about 25 minutes.
9. Serve hot or cool completely, wrap in foil, and freeze. Makes 3 tourtières.
